Free calculator · 60 seconds

Pipeline coverage calculator.

Are you going to hit quota? This calculator tells you in 60 seconds — based on the standard B2B SaaS coverage math (pipeline ÷ quota × win rate). Adjust the inputs to your team; the tool flags coverage gaps and tells you what to do about them.

Your inputs
Team-level or per-rep × team size. Whichever you\'re measuring.
$1M
Sum of all open opportunities you expect to close this quarter
$2.5M
Typical B2B SaaS: 18-28%. Mid-market: 22-35%. Enterprise: 12-22%.
25%
From qualified opportunity to closed-won. Typical B2B: 60-120 days.
90 days
How many days remain to close pipeline this quarter
60 days
Coverage diagnosis
2.5×
Pipeline-to-quota coverage ratio
Expected close ($) $625K
Quota gap $375K short
Recommended coverage 4.0×
Additional pipeline needed $1.5M
Days needed to source 90 days

Likely to hit quota with current pipeline

How the math works

What\'s behind the calculation

Coverage ratio = pipeline value ÷ quarterly quota. B2B SaaS rule of thumb: you need 3-4× coverage to reliably hit quota when win rate is 25-30%. Lower win rate → higher required coverage.

Expected close = pipeline × win rate. This is the statistical expectation of how much closes assuming your historical win rate holds.

Recommended coverage uses the formula: target = 1 ÷ win rate × buffer. Default buffer is 1.0x — meaning if your win rate is 25%, you need 4× coverage to expect to hit quota.

Most pipeline coverage problems aren\'t coverage problems at all — they\'re stage-conversion problems or aging-deal problems disguised as coverage. See how to fix pipeline coverage problems for the full diagnostic.
